case_title: SALVADOR FLORES MENDEZ VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-01-2010 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE SEP-17-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON AUG-03-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR JAN-03-2011 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-01-2010 CONTINUED TO JAN-03-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING JAN-03-2011 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS THAT A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE IN LIGHT OF THE HISTORY OF FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDERS AND RULES. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MENDEZ, SALVADOR FLORES ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR AUG-03-2010 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST SALVADOR FLORES MENDEZ, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: NOV-01-2010, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-16-2010. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MENDEZ, SALVADOR FLORES AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO SAN FRANCISCO INTERNATIONAL AIRPORT DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-17-2010 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-21-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-02-2010
MINI-MINUTES FOR NOV-01-2010 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-03-2011 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: There being no appearance nor objection filed, the court ordered the case dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings not reported. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-01-2010 Continued To Jan-03-11 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 1/3/2011 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings not reported. (212)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-03-2010 Set For Order To Show Cause On Nov-01-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
